svg.title: Fungal BGC and GCF multipanel
svg.desc: Two-panel summary for 20 fungal genomes. Panel A compares BGC and GCF counts by tool and broad biosynthetic class. Panel B shows a BiG-SCAPE clustering network with 561 nodes and 117 similarity edges; node fill denotes broad BGC class, labels identify genomes, and MiBIG markers indicate reference context.
svg.text: BGC and GCF count by genome, tool, and class
